siteAddress: Unit 2, Lot 8, Busch Street, Sunshine North VIC 3020
inspectionNotes: The owner was on site during this inspection.
The painting contractor was on site.
Power/Lighting was not switched on/connected at the time of inspection (potentially for electrical safety reasons). Therefore these areas were not able to be fully inspected.
The water supply was not turned on at the time of inspection (potentially for leaks/areas not fully fitted off). Therefore these areas were not able to be fully inspected.
The final house clean had not yet been completed.
The builder/site supervisor was on site during this inspection.
The owner should mark all minor defects and paint touch ups with the builder/site supervisor to ensure all of these issues are addressed to their satisfaction.
Several appliances were either not installed or being installed during this inspection, including range-hoods.

inspectionItems.itemNote: Position of water tank pump separate from tank (installed adjacent to living areas) & within private open space. Builder to advise on installation location.
Laundry. Ceiling appears out of level (overhead cabinet doors are aligned at bottom edges, RHS doors are binding on ceiling).
Laundry ceiling, behind overhead cabinet doors.
Garage storage, void not shown on plans provided.
Bedroom 3. Top hinge installed with the pin upside down.
Bedroom 1 ensuite, shower window trim areas. Several small voids in grout.
Bedroom 1 Ensuite, shower area. Mixer diverter.
Several areas throughout (likely removed for painting works).
Several areas throughout, including spreaders upon roof.

Built-in robes/linen throughout. Architraves have been installed backwards (single bevel edge on outside edge of jamb) in several internal robe/linen areas. This finish is inconsistent with the rest of the dwelling.
Under stairs. Skirting board finishes short of architrave & quad is in it’s place. This finish is inconsistent with the rest of the dwelling.
Stairwell. Inconsistent gaps under stair trim from upper level balustrade.
Showers throughout. Rainheads/hand held outlets not centred between tiles & screen.
Around meter box. Depth & finish inconsistent.
